name: Spanakopita (Greek Spinach and Cheese Pie)
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 lb Fresh Young Spinach, washed and finely chopped
1/2 lb Feta Cheese, drained and crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add onions, scallions, and garlic. Cook until soft but not brown.
2. Stir in spinach and cook, covered, for 2-3 minutes or until wilted. Remove lid and continue cooking another 6-8 minutes or until liquid has evaporated.
3. Transfer spinach to a bowl. Stir in buttermilk (or cream) and season with salt and pepper.
4. Whisk eggs into the spinach mixture.
5. Preheat oven to 300°F (150°C). Grease a 12 x 7-inch baking dish with butter.
6. Lay one sheet of filo on bottom of dish, pressing edges firmly into corners and sides. Brush with butter.
7. Layer with remaining filo sheets, brushing each with butter after placing.
8. Repeat layering until all filo is used, ending with a final layer brushed with butter.
9. Spread spinach mixture over filo layers. Top with another sheet of filo brushed with butter.
10. Fold edges of last filo layer under and seal the sides.
11. Bake for 55-60 minutes or until filo is crisp and golden brown. Serve cut into squares hot or at room temperature.
Yield: 6 servings
